spaceflight.title: Satellite maker Apex’s valuation rises to $2.3 billion after latest $200 million raise
spaceflight.summary: Apex has raised more than $200 million to expand in-house satellite production capabilities, announcing a funding round June 5 it says nearly doubled the four-year-old manufacturer’s valuation to $2.

spaceflight.title: The Exploration Company completes drop test of Nyx capsule
spaceflight.summary:
